title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a complete end-to-end AI video generation workflow using Claude Code that automates planning, coding, voice generation, visual design, music selection, and video production from a single command or URL. The system integrates multiple AI tools including Archon for orchestration and HyperFrames for video generation to produce polished videos without human editors, animators, or production teams.
